title: ceterach cordatum var. namaquense
intro: Ceterach cordatum var. namaquense, also known as the namaquensis fern, is a variety of the Ceterach cordatum fern species, a type of lycopod fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of the namaquensis fern include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tea or infusion, and its extracts are used to create topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin conditions.
